summary: Comprehensive testing of LUCCCA Enterprise Platform - All 5 engines (Operations Core, AI Forecasting, POS Integration, Event Lifecycle, Labor Cost) fully functional. 25/25 backend tests passed, all 6 frontend views working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns across 5 engine modules
All API endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Proper error handling with HTTPException for 404/400 cases
Environment variables used correctly for MONGO_URL and DB_NAME
seed_data_creation: Database was already seeded with 10 ingredients, 5 recipes, 5 menu items, 4 events, 30 days consumption history, 8 labor positions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 engines fully tested and working: Operations Core (ingredients, recipes, inventory receive/consume, invoice processing, PO suggestions), AI Forecasting (7-day forecasts, order schedule, stock alerts), POS Integration (transaction processing, inventory decrement, sales analytics), Event Lifecycle (25-stage pipeline, GL journal entries, aggregate P&L), Labor Cost (8 positions, auto-plan staffing, variance analysis). Frontend has 6 views all functional with proper data-testid attributes.

operations_core.get_ingredients: PASS - Returns 11 ingredients with SKU, cost, stock
operations_core.recipe_cost: PASS - Calculates accurate food cost per portion
operations_core.receive_inventory: PASS - Increases stock and tracks transactions
operations_core.consume_inventory: PASS - Decreases stock and feeds to forecasting
operations_core.process_invoice: PASS - Creates ingredients and updates inventory
operations_core.po_suggestions: PASS - Returns items below reorder point

ai_forecasting.forecast_all: PASS - Returns forecasts with stockout predictions
ai_forecasting.forecast_ingredient: PASS - Returns 7-day daily forecasts with confidence

pos_integration.pos_transaction: PASS - Processes sale, decrements inventory, calculates food cost %
pos_integration.pos_analytics: PASS - Returns sales mix with revenue and food cost

event_lifecycle.create_event: PASS - Creates event at prospect stage
event_lifecycle.deposit_gl_entries: PASS - Creates GL journal entries on deposit
event_lifecycle.aggregate_pnl: PASS - Returns aggregated P&L across closed events

labor_cost.get_positions: PASS - Returns 8 configured positions with rates
labor_cost.auto_plan_labor: PASS - Generates staffing plan based on guest count
labor_cost.labor_variance: PASS - Returns planned vs actual comparison

frontend_views.operations_dashboard: PASS - Shows ingredients table, charts, recipe costs
frontend_views.event_pipeline: PASS - Kanban board with events in correct phases
frontend_views.forecasting_view: PASS - Demand predictions and recommended orders
frontend_views.pnl_dashboard: PASS - Aggregate revenue, COGS, labor, net profit
frontend_views.labor_view: PASS - Auto-plan button generates staffing plan
frontend_views.pos_view: PASS - Simulate POS Sale processes transaction
